name: github
description: GitHub MCP — read PRs, issues, and code reviews for growth capture and the review agent.

steps: Create a GitHub Personal Access Token at https://github.com/settings/tokens.
Grant the following scopes: repo (read), read:org, read:user.
Set GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN in your shell environment (e.g. ~/.zshrc).
Add the claude_mcp_entry block below to your Claude Code MCP settings (~/.claude/settings.json or project .claude/settings.json).
